rows.label: qev025901_MSG0001
rows.name:
Oh... aren't you the Earthling who
took down Fraisie with Dr. Staccata?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025901_MSG0002
rows.name:
You came at just the right time, you know! The doctor
hasn't come back from his undercover investigation
at all, so I was just wondering what I should do![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025901_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: qev025901_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask what the undercover investigation is.

rows.label: qev025901_JNK0020
rows.name: Forget

rows.label: qev025901_SEL0021
rows.name: State that you don't recall the name Fraisie.

rows.label: qev025901_MSG0003
rows.name:
That Fraisie took the remaining
believers after that and disappeared
into the Valley of Oblivion, you know![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025901_MSG0004
rows.name:
Wow! Aren't you a super
forgetful person?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025901_MSG0005
rows.name:
She's the worst kind of villain who spread a lethal
poison in Biahno Lake, handed out "Miracle Water" to
the Ma-non, and tried to propagate her cult, you know![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025901_MSG0006
rows.name:
...Remember now? After that, she took the remaining
believers of the God of Miracles and disappeared
into the Black Steel Continent, didn't she![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025901_MSG0007
rows.name:
So, worried she might pull something again,
Staccata-sensei disguised himself as a
believer and sneaked into their hideout![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025901_MSG0008
rows.name:
But there hasn't been any contact from
him at all... I'm worried that maybe
the doctor got caught by Fraisie...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025901_MSG0009
rows.name:
...Whoa! Speak of the devil, this is unbelievable!
A transmission from the doctor, isn't it! Wait
a sec, I'll answer it right away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025901_MSG0010
rows.name:
Yes, yes, this is Jilinbo! Doctor,
where are you right now...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025901_MSG0011
rows.name:
I am currently at the Bandits' Hideout on the
Black Steel Continent! Please contact [ST:playername ]
immediately and tell them to come rescue me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025901_MSG0012
rows.name:
...Tch! Fraisie has returned! I'm counting
on you, at this rate Staccata will...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025901_MSG0013
rows.name:
Doctor! ...Ah, the connection
cut out, didn't it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025901_MSG0014
rows.name:
This is super bad news, but
the fact that you were here
was good timing, wasn't it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025901_MSG0015
rows.name:
I'm begging you! Please save
Staccata-sensei! Please go stop
Fraisie's evil deeds, won't you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025901_MSG0016
rows.name:
Then please head to the Black
Steel Continent right away, okay![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025901_MSG0017
rows.name:
Please rescue our clumsy but
straightforward... very pretty doctor![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025901_MSG0022
rows.name:
Since it's Fraisie, she's definitely
doing something no good, isn't she![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025901_MSG0023
rows.name:
Please head to the Bandits' Hideout
on the Black Steel Continent at super
speed and save the doctor, okay![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025901_MSG0024
rows.name:
Yahoo! The doctor is back! And it looks
like Fraisie was caught too, so
congratulations all around, isn't it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025901_MSG0025
rows.name:
This is a reward from Jilinbo. Please
accept it without any hesitation, okay![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025901_MSG0026
rows.name:
Say... It looks like all the Ma-non
Fraisie took with her ended up
getting killed, didn't they?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025901_MSG0027
rows.name:
If I hadn't been saved by the
doctor and you, Jilinbo might
have been killed too, you know...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025901_MSG0028
rows.name:
...So from now on, Jilinbo will protect the reckless
doctor even if it costs my life! Yeah, that's what
returning a favor is all about, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025901_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev025901_SEL0031
rows.name: Leave Staccata in Jilinbo's hands.

rows.label: qev025901_JNK0040
rows.name: Warn

rows.label: qev025901_SEL0041
rows.name: Tell him to be careful of aliens disguising themselves as Earthlings.

rows.label: qev025901_MSG0029
rows.name:
You can leave it to me, can't you!
...Oh, that's right. If you can, please
teach Jilinbo how to fight sometime![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025901_MSG0030
rows.name:
Those are some troublesome folks, aren't
they! Got it, I won't let a single
suspicious person near the doctor, okay![ST:wait ]
